Just turned in my very last paper at stanford. 

feeling very mixed-valence. im quite proud of this even tho it feels messy and i went a couple pages over the 10-page limit. i think this and my previous essay prove that i can *do philosophy*, something i have been v insecure... https://t.co/6tELopjEyL

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2024-08-30
artifacts.excerpt: I want to put out a sonar blast that people who interact with me online can fairly assume I'm extremely open-minded, curious about your opinion, not offended by differing beliefs, and I don't take anything I believe so seriously that I can't change my mind in spite of evidence.

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2024-08-30

I want to put out a sonar blast also that I won't ad-hominem you, or attack you for having different opinions than me. These are the table stakes I see for having a discussion, and they go both ways. 

these are core to who i am, and how i show up online
